title: v0.0.9 — Spotlight Search & Scrolling Promotion Blocks
content: Two new custom Gutenberg blocks land in Nextora: spotlight-search for instant live search overlays, and scrolling-promotion for CSS-only marquee bars. Both blocks are fully configurable through the block inspector and inherit global design tokens from theme.json.

title: v0.0.6 — Template Store & JSON Import/Export
content: The mega menu builder now includes a template store with built-in starter layouts (Three Column Navigation, Featured + Links). You can import templates from the plugin, parent theme, or child theme, and export your designs as JSON for reuse across sites.

title: v0.0.8 — WooCommerce Mini Cart & Elementor Improvements
content: The header block now supports a WooCommerce mini cart portal. Elementor integration received editor settings refinements and separate core block asset loading for better performance when both editors are active.

title: TypeScript & esbuild Build Pipeline
content: Migrated the plugin's front-end to TypeScript with esbuild, replacing the previous Babel/Webpack setup. Build times are now 3x faster, and the compiled filter blocks are 40% smaller. Added PHPStan level-8 static analysis to the quality gate.

title: Initial Dev Preview — Pattern Mode with Multi-Provider AI
content: First developer preview of Prompt to Pattern ships with Pattern mode. Describe a page layout in the block editor sidebar, and the AI selects matching patterns from your installed set. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, and DeepSeek providers through WordPress core's AI Client.

title: ARIA Accessibility & Keyboard Navigation
content: Full keyboard navigation and ARIA compliance for mega menu panels. Tab and arrow key navigation, focus trapping within open panels, and proper aria-expanded/aria-haspopup attributes across all menu items.

title: v0.0.7 — Image Gallery Grid & Slide Blocks
content: Two new media blocks: image-gallery-grid with GSAP scroll-reveal animations, and image-gallery-slide with Swiper carousel. Both support responsive column counts, lazy loading, and lightbox integration.

title: Fix: Mobile Filter Drawer Scroll Position
content: Fixed a bug where the mobile filter drawer would reset scroll position when toggling category checkboxes. The filter panel now preserves scroll state and focuses back on the last interacted element after results update.
